Test_Objective: Verify unauthenticated user is redirected to login when accessing /kudos
Precondition: User is not logged in (no active session)
Steps:
1. Open the browser
2. Enter the URL /kudos directly in the address bar
3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /login page

Test_Objective: Verify authenticated user can access /kudos page
Precondition: User is logged in with a valid Supabase Auth session
Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Enter the URL /kudos directly in the address bar
3. Press Enter
Expected_Result: Sun* Kudos - Live Board page displayed successfully

Test_Objective: Verify expired session triggers redirect to login
Precondition: User was previously logged in but session cookie has expired
Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Navigate to /kudos and confirm the page loads
3. Wait for the session to expire (or manually clear the session cookie)
4. Refresh the /kudos page
Expected_Result: User is redirected to /login page

Test_Objective: Verify navigation to /kudos via header nav link
Precondition: User is logged in with a valid session
Steps:
1. Log in to the application
2. Locate the main navigation header
3. Click the "Kudos" nav item
Expected_Result: User navigated to /kudos; Live Board page displayed

Test_Objective: Verify all major sections present in correct order
Precondition: User is authenticated and navigates to /kudos
Steps:
1. Open the Sun* Kudos - Live Board screen
2. Scroll through the entire page from top to bottom
3. Verify the presence and order of all major sections
Expected_Result: Four sections in order: KV Kudos (Hero Banner) with recognition input; HIGHLIGHT KUDOS with subtitle/divider/title/filters/carousel; SPOTLIGHT with subtitle/divider/title/word cloud board (rounded-47px; border #998C5F; min-h 548px); ALL KUDOS with subtitle/divider/title/feed (left)/stats sidebar+leaderboard (right; sticky)

Test_Objective: Verify recognition input placeholder text
Precondition: User is authenticated and navigates to /kudos
Steps:
1. Open the Sun* Kudos - Live Board screen
2. Locate the Button ghi nhận inside the KV Kudos section
3. Verify the placeholder text
Expected_Result: Placeholder text displayed: "Hôm nay; bạn muốn gửi lời cảm ơn và ghi nhận đến ai?"

Test_Objective: Verify spotlight search input placeholder
Precondition: User is authenticated and navigates to /kudos
Steps:
1. Open the Sun* Kudos - Live Board screen
2. Scroll to the SPOTLIGHT section
3. Locate the search input at top-left of spotlight board
4. Verify the placeholder text
Expected_Result: Placeholder text displayed: "Tìm kiếm"

Test_Objective: Verify carousel defaults to first card active
Precondition: User is authenticated and navigates to /kudos. Highlighted kudos available.
Steps:
1. Open the Sun* Kudos - Live Board screen
2. Scroll to the HIGHLIGHT KUDOS section
3. Observe the carousel default state
Expected_Result: First card displayed as active center card at full scale (1.0); adjacent cards at scale 0.85; far cards at scale 0.75

Test_Objective: Verify pagination defaults to 1/N
Precondition: User is authenticated and navigates to /kudos. Highlighted kudos available.
Steps:
1. Open the Sun* Kudos - Live Board screen
2. Scroll to the HIGHLIGHT KUDOS section
3. Observe the pagination indicator
Expected_Result: Pagination displays "1/N"; active page number in gold (#FFEA9E) at 32px bold; total in 16px white/60%

Test_Objective: Verify click opens send kudos dialog
Precondition: User is logged in and on the Live Board page
Steps:
1. Locate the "Button ghi nhận" input field in the hero banner area
2. Click on the input field
Expected_Result: Send kudos dialog opened with form fields displayed

Test_Objective: Verify click opens hashtag dropdown
Precondition: User is logged in. Highlight section visible.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Highlight section
2. Click the ButtonHashtag filter button
Expected_Result: Dropdown list of hashtags (from database) displayed

Test_Objective: Verify selecting a hashtag from dropdown
Precondition: User is logged in. ButtonHashtag dropdown open with available hashtags.
Steps:
1. Click the ButtonHashtag filter button to open the dropdown
2. Select a hashtag from the dropdown list
Expected_Result: Selected hashtag applied as filter; dropdown closes with selection indicated

Test_Objective: Verify click opens department dropdown
Precondition: User is logged in. Highlight section visible.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Highlight section
2. Click the "Button Phòng ban" filter button
Expected_Result: Dropdown list of departments (from database) displayed

Test_Objective: Verify selecting a department from dropdown
Precondition: User is logged in. Button Phòng ban dropdown open.
Steps:
1. Click the "Button Phòng ban" filter button to open the dropdown
2. Select a department from the dropdown list
Expected_Result: Selected department applied as filter; dropdown closes with selection indicated

Test_Objective: Verify hashtag filter updates carousel
Precondition: User is logged in. Highlight section has kudos with various hashtags.
Steps:
1. Click the ButtonHashtag filter button
2. Select a specific hashtag from the dropdown
3. Observe the Highlight Carousel
Expected_Result: Highlight Carousel updates to show only kudos matching selected hashtag

Test_Objective: Verify department filter updates carousel
Precondition: User is logged in. Highlight section has kudos from various departments.
Steps:
1. Click the "Button Phòng ban" filter button
2. Select a specific department from the dropdown
3. Observe the Highlight Carousel
Expected_Result: Highlight Carousel updates to show only kudos from selected department

Test_Objective: Verify next button slides carousel forward
Precondition: User is logged in. Carousel has multiple items; not on last page.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Highlight Carousel
2. Click the "Button tiến" (Next) button
Expected_Result: Carousel slides to next card; center card changes to next item

Test_Objective: Verify previous button slides carousel backward
Precondition: User is logged in. Carousel has multiple items; not on first page.
Steps:
1. Navigate the carousel forward at least one step
2. Click the "Button lùi" (Previous) button
Expected_Result: Carousel slides to previous card; center card changes to previous item

Test_Objective: Verify next button disables at last page
Precondition: User is logged in. Carousel has multiple items.
Steps:
1. Navigate the carousel forward by clicking "Button tiến" repeatedly
2. Continue clicking until the last page is reached
Expected_Result: Button tiến becomes disabled when carousel reaches last page

Test_Objective: Verify previous button disables at first page
Precondition: User is logged in. Carousel is on a page beyond the first.
Steps:
1. Navigate the carousel backward by clicking "Button lùi" repeatedly
2. Continue clicking until the first page is reached
Expected_Result: Button lùi becomes disabled when carousel reaches first page (page 1)

Test_Objective: Verify pagination updates when navigating carousel
Precondition: User is logged in. Carousel has multiple pages.
Steps:
1. Note the current pagination indicator (e.g.; "1/5")
2. Click "Button tiến" to go to the next page
3. Observe the pagination indicator
Expected_Result: Pagination indicator updates to reflect new current page (e.g.; "1/5" to "2/5"); active page in gold (#FFEA9E)

Test_Objective: Verify carousel with single item
Precondition: User is logged in. Only one highlighted kudo exists.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Highlight section where only one kudo is present
2. Observe the carousel and navigation buttons
Expected_Result: Single kudo card displayed in center; both Button tiến and Button lùi disabled; pagination shows "1/1"

Test_Objective: Verify carousel with multiple items
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple highlighted kudos exist (5 items).
Steps:
1. Navigate to the Highlight section
2. Observe the carousel display
Expected_Result: Multiple kudo cards displayed; center card at scale 1.0; adjacent at 0.85; far at 0.75; navigation buttons functional

Test_Objective: Verify carousel boundary behavior
Precondition: User is logged in. Carousel has multiple pages.
Steps:
1. On first page; verify Button lùi disabled and Button tiến enabled
2. Navigate to last page
3. Verify Button tiến disabled and Button lùi enabled
Expected_Result: First page: Button lùi disabled; Button tiến enabled. Last page: Button tiến disabled; Button lùi enabled.

Test_Objective: Verify search highlights matching profiles
Precondition: User is logged in. Spotlight section visible with names in word cloud.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Spotlight section
2. Click on the "Tìm kiếm" search input field
3. Type a Sunner name (e.g.; "Nguyen")
Expected_Result: Matching profiles highlighted on the spotlight word cloud board

Test_Objective: Verify search with non-existent name
Precondition: User is logged in. Spotlight section visible.
Steps:
1. Click on the "Tìm kiếm" search input field
2. Type a name that does not exist (e.g.; "XYZNONEXISTENT")
Expected_Result: No names highlighted on the spotlight word cloud

Test_Objective: Verify clearing search resets word cloud
Precondition: User is logged in. Spotlight section visible.
Steps:
1. Click on the "Tìm kiếm" search input field
2. Leave the field blank or clear the text
Expected_Result: All names return to default display state (no highlighting)

Test_Objective: Verify search cross-effect on word cloud
Precondition: User is logged in. Spotlight word cloud has multiple names.
Steps:
1. Type a partial name in the "Tìm kiếm" search input (e.g.; "Tran")
2. Observe the word cloud
Expected_Result: Matching names visually highlighted; non-matching names remain in default state

Test_Objective: Verify pan/zoom toggle
Precondition: User is logged in. Spotlight section visible.
Steps:
1. Locate the Pan zoom button on the Spotlight board
2. Click the Pan zoom button
3. Click the Pan zoom button again
Expected_Result: First click toggles mode; second click toggles back; interaction mode changes accordingly

Test_Objective: Verify total kudos count displayed correctly
Precondition: User is logged in. Kudos exist in the system.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Spotlight section
2. Observe the kudos counter at top center of spotlight board
Expected_Result: Total kudos count displayed in 48px bold white font; matching actual total in system

Test_Objective: Verify latest kudo notification format
Precondition: User is logged in. At least one kudo sent recently.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Spotlight section
2. Observe the bottom-left area of spotlight board
Expected_Result: Latest kudo notification displayed: "HH:mmPM [Name] đã nhận được một Kudos mới"

Test_Objective: Verify heart like/unlike toggle
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post visible in feed.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post in the ALL KUDOS feed
2. Click the Hearts button
3. Click the Hearts button again
Expected_Result: First click: heart toggles (not liked -> liked); second click: toggles back; like count updates

Test_Objective: Verify heart state changes to liked
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post not yet liked is visible.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post with gray (not liked) heart
2. Click the Hearts button
Expected_Result: Heart icon changes from gray to colored (liked); like count increases by 1

Test_Objective: Verify heart state changes to not liked
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post already liked is visible.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post with colored (liked) heart
2. Click the Hearts button
Expected_Result: Heart icon changes from colored to gray (not liked); like count decreases by 1

Test_Objective: Verify like count increments and decrements correctly
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post with known like count.
Steps:
1. Note current like count
2. Click Hearts button to like
3. Verify count
4. Click Hearts button to unlike
Expected_Result: After liking: count +1; after unliking: count -1; returns to original value

Test_Objective: Verify copy link copies URL to clipboard
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post visible in feed.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post in the feed
2. Click the Copy link button
Expected_Result: Kudo URL copied to clipboard; toast confirmation displayed

Test_Objective: Verify view detail navigates to kudo detail page
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post visible in feed.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post in the feed
2. Click the "View detail" link in the action bar
Expected_Result: User navigated to kudo detail page for selected kudo

Test_Objective: Verify avatar hover shows profile preview
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post with avatars visible.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post
2. Hover over the sender avatar
3. Move away then hover over the receiver avatar
Expected_Result: Preview popup showing user profile info displayed on hover for both sender and receiver

Test_Objective: Verify avatar click navigates to profile
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post with avatars visible.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post
2. Click on the sender or receiver avatar
Expected_Result: User navigated to profile page of clicked user

Test_Objective: Verify name click navigates to profile
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post with names visible.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post
2. Click on the sender or receiver name link
Expected_Result: User navigated to profile page of clicked user

Test_Objective: Verify empty feed state
Precondition: User is logged in. No kudos exist in the system.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the ALL KUDOS section
2. Observe the feed area
Expected_Result: Empty state displayed (no kudo cards); no errors

Test_Objective: Verify feed displays multiple kudos
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple kudos exist.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the ALL KUDOS section
2. Observe the feed
Expected_Result: Multiple kudo post cards displayed with correct sender/receiver info; content; hashtags; action bars

Test_Objective: Verify cursor-based load more in feed
Precondition: User is logged in. More kudos than initial page load.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the ALL KUDOS section
2. Scroll to bottom of feed or locate load more trigger
3. Trigger load more
Expected_Result: Next batch of kudos loaded via cursor-based pagination and appended to feed

Test_Objective: Verify feed sorted newest first
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple kudos with different timestamps.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the ALL KUDOS section
2. Observe the order of kudo posts
Expected_Result: Kudos displayed in descending order by creation time (newest first)

Test_Objective: Verify feed post content truncated at 5 lines
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post with content longer than 5 lines exists.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the ALL KUDOS section
2. Locate a kudo post with long content
3. Observe the content area
Expected_Result: Content truncated at 5 lines with "..." at the end

Test_Objective: Verify highlight card content truncated at 3 lines
Precondition: User is logged in. A highlighted kudo with content longer than 3 lines.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Highlight Carousel
2. Locate a kudo card with long content
3. Observe the appreciation message area
Expected_Result: Content truncated at 3 lines with "..." at the end

Test_Objective: Verify clicking hashtag in post filters feed
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post with hashtags visible in feed.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post with hashtag tags in ALL KUDOS section
2. Click on a hashtag tag in the post
Expected_Result: Feed filtered to show only kudos containing clicked hashtag

Test_Objective: Verify hashtag click cross-effect on feed
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple kudos with different hashtags.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post with a specific hashtag (e.g.; "#Dedicated")
2. Click on the hashtag
3. Observe the feed
Expected_Result: Feed updates to display only kudos with clicked hashtag; others no longer visible

Test_Objective: Verify stats sidebar shows correct user statistics
Precondition: User is logged in. User has sent/received kudos and secret boxes.
Steps:
1. Navigate to the ALL KUDOS section
2. Observe the Stats sidebar on the right
Expected_Result: Sidebar displays correct values: Kudos received; Kudos sent; Hearts received; Secret Boxes opened; Secret Boxes unopened

Test_Objective: Verify click opens secret box dialog
Precondition: User is logged in. User has at least one unopened secret box.
Steps:
1. Locate the "Mở quà" button in the Stats sidebar
2. Click the "Mở quà" button
Expected_Result: Open Secret Box dialog opened

Test_Objective: Verify button enabled/disabled based on unopened boxes
Precondition: User is logged in.
Steps:
1. Observe "Mở quà" button when user has unopened secret boxes
2. Observe "Mở quà" button when user has zero unopened secret boxes
Expected_Result: With unopened boxes: button enabled and clickable; with zero boxes: button disabled

Test_Objective: Verify top 10 receivers displayed
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple Sunners have received gifts.
Steps:
1. Locate "10 SUNNER NHẬN QUÀ MỚI NHẤT" section in Stats sidebar
2. Observe the leaderboard
Expected_Result: Top 10 most recent gift receivers displayed with avatar (colored border); name (gold); "Đã nhận ticket" label

Test_Objective: Verify highlights sorted by most liked
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple highlighted kudos with different like counts.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Highlight Carousel
2. Observe the order of kudo cards
Expected_Result: Highlighted kudos sorted by most likes (descending); equal likes sorted by newest first

Test_Objective: Verify word cloud names do not overlap
Precondition: User is logged in. Multiple names in spotlight word cloud.
Steps:
1. Scroll to the Spotlight section
2. Observe the word cloud display
Expected_Result: All names positioned using grid-based layout with jitter; no names overlap; opacity varies by kudos count (0.4 to 1.0)

Test_Objective: Verify time display format
Precondition: User is logged in. Kudo posts with timestamps visible.
Steps:
1. Locate a kudo post in feed or highlight carousel
2. Observe the posted time display
Expected_Result: Time displayed in format "HH:mm - MM/DD/YYYY" (e.g.; "08:30 - 03/17/2026")

Test_Objective: Verify like persists after page refresh
Precondition: User is logged in. A kudo post is visible.
Steps:
1. Like a kudo post by clicking Hearts button
2. Refresh the page
3. Observe the like count
Expected_Result: Like count persists after refresh; confirming database save

Test_Objective: Verify new kudo appears at top after refresh
Precondition: User is logged in. Another user sends a new kudo.
Steps:
1. Observe current feed order
2. Have another user send a new kudo
3. Refresh the page
Expected_Result: Newly sent kudo appears at top of feed; maintaining newest-first order

Test_Objective: Verify stats update after sending kudo
Precondition: User is logged in. User sends a new kudo.
Steps:
1. Note current stats values in sidebar
2. Send a new kudo via the send kudos dialog
3. Return to Live Board and observe stats sidebar
Expected_Result: Kudos sent count incremented by 1; reflecting updated database value
